Clarity is Safety.

80% More Light

Oxidation blocks light output. Our process restores optical clarity for safer nighttime driving and faster reaction times.

Curb Appeal Boost

Cloudy headlights make a car look 10 years older. Restoration adds significant value to your resale price.

Southern Alberta Built

Our multi-step process is designed specifically to withstand the harsh Southern Alberta UV rays and gravel. We don't just clean; we restore and protect.

Education Center

Why Restore vs Replace?

Many vehicle owners don't realize that restoration isn't just cosmetic—it's a critical safety and financial decision. Here is the breakdown.

The Cost Reality

OEM Replacement

$800 - $1,500+

New assemblies from the dealer are incredibly expensive due to integrated electronics.

Aftermarket Parts

$200 - $400

Cheaper, but known for poor fitment, leaking seals, and inferior light projection.

Dobson Restoration

$99 - $169

Keep your high-quality factory housings. Restore the lens for a fraction of the cost.

The Science of Fading

Factory Clear Coat Failure

Car manufacturers apply a thin UV coating at the factory. In Southern Alberta's high-altitude sun, this coating fails after 3-5 years, exposing the polycarbonate plastic.

Oxidation Acceleration

Once the coating is gone, UV rays interact with oxygen to physically yellow and pit the plastic surface. This isn't dirt—it's chemical degradation.

My Solution:

We verify the failure depth, sand it away completely, and re-apply a heavy industrial UV coating that is thicker and harder than the factory original.

Professional Packages
Built to Last.

We don't do wipe-on fixes. Every restoration includes multi-step leveling and professional UV protection.

Standard Restoration

$99+/per set

Professional multi-step process for common oxidation.

Multi-step oxidation leveling
Precision machine polishing
Industrial UV Top Coat
1-Year Clarity Warranty

Satisfaction Guarantee

$169+/per set

Maximum durability for long-term Southern Alberta sun.

Custom Quote/per set

Why Restore?

New headlights are expensive. Restoration saves you over 80% of the cost while providing factory clarity.

Have Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

We are available for inquiries from 8:00 AM to 9:00 PM, Monday through Saturday. We can often accommodate early morning or late evening bookings to fit your work schedule.

Yes! We offer a re-do warranty. If your headlights show signs of oxidation or fading within the protection period of your chosen package, we will come back and restore them again at no additional cost to you.

Most restorations take between 60 to 90 minutes. We have a comfortable waiting area, or you can drop off your vehicle and we'll text you when it's done.

Not necessarily! As long as we have access to your vehicle and a power outlet nearby, we can complete the restoration and send you a link for easy digital payment.

Absolutely not. We use professional-grade automotive masking tape to protect all surrounding paint and trim before we begin the sanding and polishing process.

Still have a question? Text Isaac directly for a fast answer.
